name: Alere Top in Silk
description: Halter top in heavyweight silk satin, defined by a softly draped v-neckline, low open back, and fringe trim detailing. Finished front pockets, horn buttons, and a self-tie back closure.

name: Lumen Jacket in Viscose
description: Relaxed mid-length jacket with a straight silhouette, pointed collar, and dropped shoulders. Designed with oversized patch pockets and a low-slung buckle belt that sits at the hips. Cut in midweight crepe-back viscose satin with a smooth face and cool hand, and finished with horn buttons and cuffed sleeves

name: Sabine Dress in Silk
description: Mini halter dress with a softly pleated neckline, elongated open back, and sweeping asymmetrical hem. Cut in smooth and crisp mid-weight silk twill that lends subtle sculptural structure to the fluid shape.

name: Nivara Dress in Mesh
description: Sheer sequin dress with a straight, body-skimming silhouette, low open back, and clean neckline. Cut in lightweight mesh and finished with hand-sewn multicolor paillettes throughout.

name: Alune Dress in Wool Silk
description: A floor length dress with a strapless, straight neckline, fitted bodice, and sculpted hips to create a refined hourglass silhouette. Made in a smooth and dry Italian wool & silk shantung with a lustrous, subtly textured finish.

name: Bastion Jacket in Silk Viscose
description: Cropped jacket with a clean crew neckline, sharp structured shoulders, and straight, wrist-length sleeves. Cut in silk canvas with a naturally textured, lustrous finish, and completed with a concealed button closure.

name: Mira Jacket in Wool Silk
description: Tailored jacket with softly structured shoulders, a sharp collar, and a clean concealed front placket. Cut in subtly textured and lustrous french wool silk and cinched as the waist with a self-tie belt.

name: Tavi Pant in Wool
description: This is a low-rise pant with a wide leg and clean, elongated line. Crafted in fine Italian wool twill for a soft hand and subtle texture, it is finished with surf-inspired double needle contrast top stitching at the waistband and front seams, and a classic cord tie closure.

name: Xorina Skirt in Mesh
description: Tiered mesh skirt in alternating sheer and opaque panels that create a clean, vertical rhythm through the full length silhouette. The mesh offers a light transparency while the structured lower panel lends a subtle lift, lending quiet, floaty movement.

name: Lumea Dress in Silk
description: Ankle length silk twill dress with a smocked bodice, shirred skirt, and geometric open back. Defined by a dropped waist and lightly gathered skirt for defined shape and volume.

name: Corin Pant in Silk
description: Relaxed straight-leg pant with an adjustable drawstring waist and elongated silhouette. Cut in semi-sheer silk ponge that offers and trimmed with delicate french lace along the waistband and down the legs.

name: Vanta Jacket in Ponyhair
description: This is a mid-length leather jacket with a straight silhouette, stand collar, and full-length raglan sleeves. Constructed in smooth Italian ponyhair leather with leather binding at the collar, cuffs, and zipper lip, it is detailed with double topstitch seams and a metal front zipper.

name: Ellery Coat in Cashmere
description: This is a full-length, double-breasted trench coat with structured shoulders, wide lapels, and a self-belt at the waist. Tailored in brushed hairy cashmere with a smooth viscose lining, and finished with horn buttons, a back vent, and subtle leather trim details.

name: Vanta Jacket in Black
description: This is a mid-length leather jacket with a straight silhouette, stand collar, and full-length raglan sleeves. Constructed in smooth black leather with suede binding at the collar, cuffs, and zipper lip, it is detailed with double topstitch seams and a metal front zipper.

name: Lazare Trouser in Python Embossed Leather
description: This is a mid-rise straight leg pant with a boyish fit throughout, finished with a zip fly, trouser closure, and front and back pockets. Crafted from Italian python-embossed leather with luminescence and defined texture, and made in Italy.

name: Lazare Trouser in Python Embossed Leather
description: This is a mid-rise straight leg pant with a boyish fit throughout, finished with a zip fly, trouser closure, and front and back pockets. Crafted from Italian python-embossed leather with luminescence and defined texture, and made in Italy.

name: Lazare Trouser in Leather
description: This is a mid-rise straight leg pant with a boyish fit throughout. Made from a buttery-soft, lightweight plongé leather sourced that is sourced in France, then crafted in Italy and finished with a zip fly, trouser closure, and front and back pockets.

name: Ater Pant in Silk
description: This is a relaxed fit, wide leg pant with an elastic waistband and clean finishings. Made in our Los Angeles atelier from opulent and heavy Italian double face silk cady, finished with a dry hand and fluid drape.

name: Zanitha Pant in Silk
description: This is a relaxed fit, straight leg pajama pant with an elastic waistband and clean finishings. Crafted in fluid mid-weight silk twill in our Los Angeles atelier.

name: Bethany Toe Ring in Gold-Plated Silver
description: Brilliant round-cut toe ring featuring a 3-carat stone set in 14K yellow gold-plated silver. Featuring a semi-flexible open band silhouette for sizing, and anchored by a refined four-prong setting. A masterpiece for your foot's summer dalliances. All Summer Diamonds sales are final. To view and shop in-person, please email to schedule an appointment at our SoHo, NY Studio.

name: Lolana Pant in Viscose
description: Voluminous and subtly sheer pleated leg pants that gather and taper at the ankle. Cut from lightweight and sheer viscose jersey with a fluid drape, dry texture, and cool hand feel. The pants are complete with a mini-short lining and elastic waistband and leg openings for ease of wear.

name: Mentra Jacket in Python Embossed Leather
description: This is a waist length moto jacket with a rounded silhouette, minimal hardware detailing, and zipper closure. Cut from python embossed leather and made in Italy.

name: Junia Pant in Wool Silk
description: The Junia Pant is low-rise with a straight, baggy leg and a relaxed fit through the hip. Cut in Italian Wool & Silk and finished with a pressed crease down the legs, 5-pocket detail, and trouser.

name: Carmela Top in Silk Cotton
description: This is an oversized button-up shirt with a fluid, relaxed drape and a pussybow scarf attached at the neck. Cut in cotton silk jacuard with a luminous sheen and refined texture, and finished with buttons at the front placket and cuffs.

name: Alere Top in Silk
description: Halter top in lightweight Italian silk georgette, defined by a softly draped v-neckline, low open back, and fringe trim detailing. Finished front pockets, a contrast placket in metallic silk canvas, woven buttons, and a self-tie back closure.

name: Alere Top in Silk
description: Halter top in lightweight Italian silk georgette, defined by a softly draped v-neckline, low open back, and fringe trim detailing. Finished front pockets, a contrast placket in metallic silk canvas, woven buttons, and a self-tie back closure.

name: Tavi Pant in Wool
description: This is a low-rise pant with a wide leg and clean, elongated line. Crafted in fine Italian wool twill for a soft hand and subtle texture, it is finished with surf-inspired double needle contrast top stitching at the waistband and front seams, and a classic cord tie closure.

name: Oraya Sweater in Cashmere
description: Medium weight cashmere sweater with a high v-neck and dolman sleeves. Designed for a relaxed fit with a slight taper at the hem, and finished with off-gauge rib detail at the neck.

name: Oraya Sweater in Cashmere
description: Medium weight cashmere sweater with a high v-neck and dolman sleeves. Designed for a relaxed fit with a slight taper at the hem, and finished with off-gauge rib detail at the neck.

name: Ondyn Cardigan in Cashmere
description: This is a compact knit cashmere cardigan, cropped just above the natural waist and defined by bell sleeves, cashmere-covered buttons, and rib detailing at the neck, sleeves, and hem.

name: Ona Sweater in Cashmere
description: This is a high-gauge cashmere sweater with a slim fit throughout and a slightly exaggerated polo collar. Finished with a half-zip detail with silver hardware and rib detailing at the sleeves and hem.

name: Marana Sweater in Wool
description: This is a relaxed fit open deep-v-neckline sweater in soft and super fine merino wool. Designed to taper slightly at the hem to create a bloussant effect through the body, and finished with rib detailing at the neck, sleeves, and hem. Wear as-is or choose to expose a bra as a styling piece underneath.

name: Marana Sweater in Wool
description: This is a relaxed fit open deep-v-neck sweater in soft and super fine merino wool. Designed to taper slightly at the hem to create a bloussant effect through the body, and finished with rib detailing at the neck, sleeves, and hem. Wear as-is or choose to expose a bra as a styling piece underneath.

name: Safre Top in Wool
description: A fitted, full-length tank top with a wide crew-neckline to refine the classic silhouette. Knit from semi-sheer and light-weight ribbed merino wool.

name: Safre Top in Wool
description: A fitted, full-length tank top with a wide boat-neckline to refine the classic silhouette. Knit from semi-sheer and light-weight ribbed merino wool.

name: Faun Shirt in Silk
description: This is an oversized button-up shirt with a fluid, relaxed drape and an elongated silhouette. Cut in light-weight silk lamé with a metallic sheen and texture, and finished with buttons at the front placket and cuffs.

name: Aveki Skirt in Ponyhair
description: This is a true mini skirt crafted in richly textured leather ponyhair with a printed bambi motif. Hand finished and complete with an invisible side zipper closure.

name: Faun Shirt in Silk
description: This is an oversized button-up shirt with a fluid, relaxed drape and an elongated silhouette. Cut in mid-weight Italian silk satin with subtle tonal striping and finished with buttons at the front placket and cuffs.

name: Moura Coat in Shearling
description: Cropped coat with a shawl collar, structured shoulders, and a slightly oversized, boxy silhouette. Tailored in plush Italian shearling with enveloping warmth and a dense, velvety texture and completed with discreet color-matched fabric-covered hook and bar closures, hitting just above the hip.

name: Verne Jean in Rigid Denim
description: The Verne Jean is low-rise with a straight, baggy leg and a relaxed fit through the hip. Made in Los Angeles and cut in rigid Japanese denim with a substantial hand and finished with a 5-button fly closure.

name: Verne Jean in Rigid Denim
description: The Verne Jean is low-rise with a straight, baggy leg and a relaxed fit through the hip. Made in Los Angeles and cut in rigid Japanese denim with a substantial hand and finished with a button fly closure.

name: Kundera Jean in Rigid Denim
description: A low to mid-rise jean with a relaxed, classic silhouette that captures the perfect slouchy fit with a flattering edge. Made from rigid cotton denim, it holds its shape while falling with ease.

name: Rhys Jean in Rigid Denim
description: The Rhys Jean is mid-rise with a straight, wide leg that falls cleanly from hip to hem. Tailored in Los Angeles from rigid Japanese denim and finished with a zipper fly closure.

name: Oracle Strand Necklace in White Gold
description: A 14" strand of cultured pearls, anchored by a round 4-carat diamond set in a brushed 14k white gold Greek-motif bezel. Slightly longer than a choker, it sits neatly along the collarbone.

name: Easy Stud Earrings in White Gold
description: A pair of classic stud earrings featuring round lab-grown diamonds, each weighing 0.5 carats, set in a clean three-prong setting of 14k white gold.

name: Luna Trench in Cotton Nylon
description: A soft-tailored, double-breasted trench coat with relaxed raglan sleeves, wide notched lapel, and detachable belt. Cut from crisp Italian cotton-nylon for subtle shine and a structured yet fluid drape. Complete with a back storm flap, adjustable cuff straps, and a center back vent.

name: Racquet String in Gold
description: A 16.25 carat line of emerald-cut diamonds, woven into a set of jewel-toned navy silk string and anchored by 14k gold settings. Standard length of the bracelet is 7", please inquire for custom length. Racquet is the new tennis as far as bracelets go. Wear it with the Ida Ring and a black silk gown to pick up soda from the store down the road. To view and shop in-person, visit our Soho Showroom at 56 Greene Street, FL 3. Open weekly Wed-Sun, 11-7pm. Returns or exchanges accepted within 14 days of shipment.

name: Oracle Bracelet in White Gold
description: A 7" strand of white cultured pearls, anchored by a 3-carat diamond in a minimal 14k white gold setting. Sphere clasp with pavé diamonds close the strand. Layers nicely with the Racquet String Bracelets in any color. To view and shop in-person, visit our Soho Showroom at 56 Greene Street, FL 3. Open weekly Wed-Sun, 11-7pm. Returns or exchanges accepted within 14 days of shipment.

name: Tahitian Oracle Strand Necklace in Gold
description: A 14" strand of Tahitian pearls, anchored by a round 6.1-carat diamond set in a brushed 14k yellow gold Greek-motif bezel. Slightly longer than a choker, it sits neatly along the collarbone and layers easily with the Tile Necklace. To view and shop in-person, visit our Soho Showroom at 56 Greene Street, FL 3. Open weekly Wed-Sun, 11-7pm. Returns or exchanges accepted within 14 days of shipment.

name: Tile Necklace in Gold
description: A line of semi-precious stone tiles of Malachite, Lapis, Synthetic Coral, Turquoise, Mother Of Pearl. Set in 14k yellow gold, each tile is separated from the next by a ¼-carat diamond in a minimal gold setting. It sits along the collarbone with a slinky curve and closes at the back neck with a delicate hook and eye. Layers nicely the Tahitian Oracle Strand Necklace. To view and shop in-person, visit our Soho Showroom at 56 Greene Street, FL 3. Open weekly Wed-Sun, 11-7pm. Returns or exchanges accepted within 14 days of shipment.

name: Lone Tile Pendant Necklace in Gold
description: A single tiger eye semi-precious stone tile set in 14k yellow gold, outlined by a continuous 1.05ctw pavé diamond surround and finished with a white cultured pearl drop. Strung on a deep tan leather cord that can be worn long or doubled. Pairs nicely with the priestess tennis drop earring in White Gold. To view and shop in-person, visit our Soho Showroom at 56 Greene Street, FL 3. Open weekly Wed-Sun, 11-7pm. Returns or exchanges accepted within 14 days of shipment.

name: Priestess Tennis Drop Earrings in White Gold
description: A 2.25 carat antique emerald-cut lab-grown diamond in each ear, accompanied by a white cultured pearl drop, suspended from a 14k white gold setting. Available to purchase as a single earring, or as a pair. To view and shop in-person, visit our Soho Showroom at 56 Greene Street, FL 3. Open weekly Wed-Sun, 11-7pm. Returns or exchanges accepted within 14 days of shipment.

name: Orbit Solitaire Huggie Earrings in Gold
description: 6 carats total of brilliant round-cut lab-grown diamonds, set in 14k yellow gold. Suspended from 14k gold huggie hoops, each 3 carat stone is held in a minimal prong setting that highlights the scale and sparkle. Available to purchase as a single earring, or as a traditional pair. To view and shop in-person, visit our Soho Showroom at 56 Greene Street, FL 3. Open weekly Wed-Sun, 11-7pm. Returns or exchanges accepted within 14 days of shipment.

name: Canary Ida Ring in Gold
description: Centered on a 5.2 carat antique emerald-cut lab-grown canary diamond and flanked by 1.8 carats worth of vivid blue trillion side stones, this ring is designed to be worn on the pinky finger while holding a tea cup to your mouth, then subtly dropping it to the floor. Set in 14k yellow gold with fine double prongs that echo the geometry of the cut, the ring is best worn with a boxy, cotton shirt and drawstring pants. To view and shop in-person, visit our Soho Showroom at 56 Greene Street, FL 3. Open weekly Wed-Sun, 11-7pm. Returns or exchanges accepted within 14 days of shipment.

name: Ismara Dress in Silk
description: Bias-cut gown with a deep scoop neckline, wide tank shape, and a floor-length hem. Crafted from metallic silk lamé that is both lightweight and opulent, creating a liquid drape that cascades over the body.

name: Xorina Skirt in Mesh

name: Lumea Dress in Silk
description: Ankle length silk twill dress with a smocked bodice, shirred skirt, and geometric open back. Defined by an under-layer organza poof at the seam for slightly exaggerated shape and volume.

name: Keaton Dress in Silk
description: A sleeveless mini dress with a sheath silhouette, boat neckline, and geometric low open back. Cut from crisp Italian silk gazar, double-layer throughout, and complete with delicate hand-sewn lace trim edges and a ppliqués .

name: Sagan Jean in Stretch Denim
description: Mid-rise stretch denim pant inspired by the clean, elongated lines of our signature Alden Pant. The silhouette is slim through the hip with a straight leg, cut in stretch Japanese denim that offers gentle flexibility and a refined smooth surface. Finished with a narrow waistband, belt loops, and an invisible side zipper.

name: Zadie Jacket in Suede
description: This is a mid-length leather jacket with a straight silhouette, stand collar, and full-length raglan sleeves. Constructed in smooth black leather with suede binding at the collar, cuffs, and zipper lip, it is detailed with double topstitch seams and a metal front zipper.

name: Rhys Pant in Corduroy
description: This is a mid-rise pant with a straight, wide leg that falls cleanly from hip to hem. Tailored in cotton corduroy with a structured drape and soft, velvety hand.

name: Rhys Pant in Corduroy
description: This is a mid-rise pant with a straight, wide leg that falls cleanly from hip to hem. Tailored in cotton corduroy with a structured drape and soft, velvety hand.

name: Brein Shirt in Cotton

name: Adrian Shirt in Cotton
description: Straight fit button-up shirt with a tuckable hem, sharp pointed collar, and western-inspired front pockets. Cut in cotton flannel with a brushed hand and substantial warmth, and finished with brown buttons at the front and cuffs.

name: Kundera Jean in Rigid Denim
description: A low to mid-rise jean with a relaxed, classic silhouette that captures the perfect slouchy fit with a flattering edge. Made from rigid cotton denim, it holds its shape while falling with ease.

name: Gunner Tank in Silk
description: This is a fitted, longline muscle tank that extends past the hip, with a crew neckline and subtly contoured armholes. Cut from double-layer pure silk jersey for a lustrous sheen and a cool, second-skin feel on the body.

name: Velin Sweater in Cashmere
description: Classic crewneck sweater in pure cashmere with a slightly shrunken, straight silhouette that contours gently to the body. Designed with long, fitted sleeves and a tubular rib neckline for a refined finish. Crafted from soft, weightless cashmere that drapes with natural ease and quiet warmth.

description: Voluminous and pleated leg pants that gather and taper at the ankle. Cut from lightweight and sheer viscose jersey with a fluid drape, dry texture, and cool hand feel. The pants are complete with an elastic waistband and leg openings for ease of wear.

name: Gunner Tank in Silk
description: This is a fitted, longline muscle tank that extends past the hip, with a crew neckline and subtly contoured armholes. Cut from double-layer pure silk jersey for a lustrous sheen and a cool, second-skin feel on the body.

description: Classic crewneck sweater in pure cashmere with a slightly shrunken, straight silhouette that contours gently to the body. name: Leary Jean in Rigid Denim
description: The Leary Jean is low-waisted with a perfectly flared leg and zipper fly closure. Cut in thick rigid denim, this is a tight-fitting jean crafted to lift the butt and elongate the legs all at once.

name: Gide Sweater in Wool
description: Crafted in semi-sheer fine merino wool, this is a slim-fit turtleneck with a sharp shoulder and rib detailing at the neck, hem, and cuffs. The silhouette is enhanced by thin shoulder pads, delicately sewn in for subtle structure and definition.

name: Herve Sweater in Cashmere
description: Medium weight cropped cashmere sweater with a funnel neck, dropped sleeve, and tapered hem for a blousant fit through the body. Finished with rib detailing at the hem and cuffs, and a reverse seam detail at the center back.

name: Gide Sweater in Wool
description: Crafted in semi-sheer fine merino wool, this is a slim-fit turtleneck with a sharp shoulder and rib detailing at the neck, hem, and cuffs. The silhouette is enhanced by thin shoulder pads, delicately sewn in for subtle structure and definition.

description: The Miller Jean is high-waisted with a very slim bootcut leg and zipper fly closure. Cut in stretch denim, this is a comfortable, tight-fitting jean designed to lift the butt and create a long, lean line.

name: Miller Jean in Stretch Denim
description: The Miller Jean is high-waisted with a very slim bootcut leg and zipper fly closure. Cut in stretch denim, this is a comfortable, tight-fitting jean designed to lift the butt and create a long, lean line.

name: Orwell Jean in Rigid Denim
description: The Orwell Jean is an ode to perfect-fit vintage denim. This rigid denim jean is mid-high rise with a classic straight leg and 5-button fly. Wear it true to size for a fitted look throughout, creating that lifted shape of the butt. Size it up one - or daringly, two - for the optimal slouch jean.

name: Elestra Top in Silk
description: Slightly cropped top with a wide boat neckline and mid-length sleeve. Cut in midweight silk crepe de chine for subtle sheen and fluid drape. Can be worn off one shoulder.

name: Cira Tank in Wool
description: A fitted, full-length tank top with a crew neckline and subtle contouring at the chest and back for a refined, classic silhouette. Knit from semi-sheer and light-weight ribbed merino wool.

name: Elara Sweater in Cashmere
description: Medium weight cashmere sweater with a high v-neck and raglan sleeves. Designed to fit slightly oversized with a slight taper at the hem, and finished with rib detailing.

name: Herve Sweater in Cashmere
description: Medium weight cropped cashmere sweater with a funnel neck, dropped sleeve, and tapered hem for a blousant fit through the body. Finished with rib detailing at the hem and cuffs, and a reverse seam detail at the center back.

name: Bradum Pant in Wool
description: This is a low-mid rise pant with a wide leg, clean waist, and invisible zipper closure at the side. Made from fine Italian wool twill that lends a soft handfeel and subtle texture.

name: Zadie Jacket in Leather
description: Waist length jacket with a bubble hem, funnel collar, and dropped, long sleeves. Cut in supple Italian Nappa leather with a soft sheen, and refined by seamed panel detailing, chest flap pockets, and sleek metal zip closure.

name: Alune Dress in Wool Silk
description: A floor length dress with a strapless, straight neckline, fitted bodice, and sculpted hips to create a refined hourglass silhouette. Made in a smooth and dry Italian wool & silk shantung with a lustrous, subtly textured finish.

name: Bastion Jacket in Wool Silk
description: Cropped jacket with a clean crew neckline, sharp structured shoulders, and straight, wrist-length sleeves. Cut in Italian wool and silk radmirzer with a smooth, lustrous finish, and completed with a row of sculptural buttons down the front.

name: Vionne Trench in Cotton Nylon
description: A soft-tailored, single-breasted a-line trench coat with horn buttons, an ulter collar, neck buckle closure, and relaxed raglan sleeves. description: Full length coat with a shawl collar, structured shoulders, and slightly oversized, relaxed silhouette. name: Elyra Jacket in Python Embossed Leather
description: Hip length single-breasted jacket with a pointed collar, straight long sleeves, and a slim, tailored silhouette. Crafted in Italian python-embossed leather with a subtle sheen and defined texture, and finished with a detachable belt, horn button front closure, and clean welt pockets.

name: Racquet String in Gold

name: Janes Tears Earrings in White Gold
